column1: # Note: These values were extracted as-is from source files provided by the agencies.
# The values are consistent within each system but variable definitions differ between agencies
# Columbia Aggregate (Bonneville Lock & Dam) : Count of returning adults at Bonneville (gross escapement before inriver fisheries and inriver mortality due to migration conditions)

# Columbia stocks (Wenatchee and  Okanagan): Estimate of stock-specific returning adults at Bonneville (gross escapement before inriver fisheries and inriver mortality due to migration conditions) based on stock composition estimates
# NOTE: This is DIFFERENT from spawner estimates (i.e. number of adults on the spawning grounds) provided for Bristol Bay and Fraser River stocks
# For detailed review of Okanagan sockeye data see Ogden et al. (2025): https://csas-scas.dfo-mpo.gc.ca/publications-publications/ffabdc85-7818-4118-ad2b-b1c47793760e?lang=en
